content.query:
--------------
--VIEWS
--------------
CREATE VIEW revenue_view
AS
SELECT 
    *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK'revenue',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'raw_ext_source',
        FORMAT='CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION='2.0',
        HEADER_ROW=TRUE
    )AS query1

SELECT * FROM revenue_view;

SELECT * FROM revenue_cetas;
